condition.description: Defines an IAM condition that determines the circumstances under which the IAM policy member has access, requiring attributes like title, description, and expression.

database.description: Specifies the name of the Spanner database to which the IAM member will be applied. Must already exist within the given instance.

instance.description: Specifies the Spanner instance to which the IAM policy member will be applied. Must be an existing instance in the same Google Cloud project.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the IAM role will be applied, such as a user, group, or service account.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to be assigned, such as roles/spanner.databaseAdmin.
